Title: Trading Questions and Answers | Help Centre

URL Source: https://deriv.com/help-centre/trading/

Published Time: Mon, 27 Apr 2026 10:27:36 GMT

Markdown Content:
## Is it normal to see candle timing differences across trading platforms?

![Image 1](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Yes, this is standard across the trading industry. Different platform providers use different timing systems, and this variation is normal when using multiple trading platforms.

## What should I do if I use both Deriv MT5 and cTrader platforms?

![Image 2](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Be aware that 4-hour chart patterns may look different between MT5 and cTrader due to the different candle start times. This is normal and expected.

For consistency in your technical analysis, consider focusing on:

*   **Lower timeframes** (1 hour and below) where platforms align
*   **One primary platform** for your main chart analysis

## Which instruments are affected by the candle timing difference?

![Image 3](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

This timing difference affects all instruments available on both platforms, including:

*   **Volatility indices** (Vol 10, Vol 75, etc.)
*   **Synthetic indices** (Boom 1000, Crash, etc.)**‍**
*   **Forex pairs** (EUR/USD, etc.)

## How does the candle timing difference impact my technical analysis?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

The different candle timing can affect:

*   **Visual technical analysis** on 4-hour charts
*   **Pattern recognition** on higher timeframes
*   **Chart-based trading decisions** when switching between platforms

The underlying market data is the same - only how it’s grouped and displayed differs.

## Does the candle timing difference affect all timeframes?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No. The timing difference primarily impacts higher timeframes like the 4-hour charts.

**1-hour timeframes and below generally align between platforms** and show nearly identical candles, as the starting times match.

## Why do my charts look different between Deriv MT5 and cTrader?

![Image 6](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

The main difference is due to different candle start times between the platforms:

*   **MT5:** 4-hour candles start at 00:00 GMT (new candles at 00:00, 04:00, 08:00, 12:00, 16:00, 20:00)
*   **cTrader:** 4-hour candles start at 01:00 GMT (new candles at 01:00, 05:00, 09:00, 13:00, 17:00, 21:00)

**What this means:** The same market data gets grouped into different 4-hour periods, creating different candle shapes and patterns between the platforms.

## How can I automate my trading strategy?

![Image 7](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Use a trading bot to automate your trading strategy. A trading bot is an automated computer program that purchases trade contracts for you while following a specific set of instructions that you provide. Build your trading bot for free on Deriv Bot; no coding is needed. You’ll also find 3 free pre-built strategies on Deriv Bot that you can customise to your needs.

## What are the trading limits on my account?

![Image 8](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To see your account’s trading limits, go to Settings > Security and safety >[Account limits](https://deriv.com/account/account-limits?_gl=1*1fyl8iq*_gcl_au*MTkzNjc0NTA0Ny4xNzA2MDA1NzY5LjE2OTA5MDE0MjMuMTcwOTc5NDEzNi4xNzA5Nzk0MTM2).

## What assets are available for trading on weekends?

![Image 9](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Synthetic indices and cryptocurrencies are available for trading 24/7.

## What are multipliers?

![Image 10](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Deriv [multipliers](https://deriv.com/trade/options) combine the upside of leverage trading without the downside of losing more than your stake. This means that when the market moves in your favour, you'll multiply your potential profits. If the market moves against your prediction, your losses are limited only to your stake. To find out more, visit the [Options](https://deriv.com/trade/options) page.

## How do I trade multipliers?

![Image 11](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Watch [this video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=viS-dhJuHek&t=1s&ab_channel=Deriv) to know more about trading multipliers.

## How do I calculate the margin required to open a CFDs position?

![Image 12](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To calculate margin required to open a CFDs position, use the following formula:

**Required Margin USD** = Volume in USD ÷ Effective Leverage*

_* Use the denominator of the Effective Leverage ratio, 1 : XXXX._

‍

To calculate the Volume in USD, use the following formula:

**Forex**: Lots x Contract size x Conversion Rate Base currency* to USD

**Other**: Lots x Contract size x Execution Price x [Conversion Rate of Base currency* to USD]

_*in Deriv MT5, this is called “Margin Currency”. You'll be able to see Margin Currency in the instrument specification table in your trading terminal._

## How do I calculate the swap charges required to keep my CFDs positions open overnight?

![Image 13](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To calculate the swap charges required for overnight CFDs positions, use the following formulas:

‍

For **swaps in points**:

Volume in lots x Contract size x Point Size* x Swap Rate

_*Point Size = 1/10^digits. You can find the digits value in the instrument specification table in your trading terminal._

‍

For **swaps in percentage**:

(Volume in lots x Contract Size x Rollover Price*) x (Swap Rate ÷ 100) ÷ 360

*Rollover Price = The last price of the day before rollover is processed

‍

## How do I calculate the pip value of my trades?

![Image 14](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To calculate the pip value of your trades, use the following formula:

**Pip value USD**: Pip Size* x Lots x Contract Size ÷ Conversion rate of account currency to USD

_*Pip size:_

*   _Forex - non JPY pairs = 0.0001_
*   _Forex - JPY pairs = 0.01_
*   _Other = 1/10^digits_

For instruments without weekend swaps, a triple swap is applied on one designated weekday. Please check your trading terminal for specific details.

## How many trading platforms do you offer?

![Image 15](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

## What is forex?

![Image 16](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Foreign exchange, or forex, is the global market of the world’s currencies, where the values of different currencies are pitted against each other in the form of forex pairs, such as EUR/USD, AUD/JPY, etc. The forex market determines the exchange rates of each currency.

Read [this article](https://blog.deriv.com/blog/posts/what-is-forex-live-trading/) to learn more about trading forex on Deriv.

‍

## What are commodities?

![Image 17](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

A commodity is either grown or produced naturally in the environment, such as agricultural products, livestock, crude oil, and precious metals like gold and silver. Read [this article](https://blog.deriv.com/blog/posts/what-are-commodities/) to learn more about trading commodities on Deriv.

## What are stock indices?

![Image 18](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Stock indices measure the value of a group of companies in the stock market. This allows investors to see how a particular set of assets is performing. Read [this article](https://blog.deriv.com/blog/posts/what-are-stocks-how-and-where-to-trade-them/) to learn more about trading stocks on Deriv.

## What are derived indices?

![Image 19](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Derived indices consist of asset prices generated from real-world and simulated markets and indices, with little to no influence from real-world events. You can trade from a variety of derived indices, including synthetic indices, derived FX indices, tactical indices and baskets.

Available 24/7, our synthetic indices emulate price movements of real-world markets with varying levels of volatility. As they aren't based on actual underlying assets, they are unaffected by real-world market events. Read [this article](https://deriv.com/blog/posts/an-introduction-to-synthetic-indices-trading) to learn more about trading synthetic indices on Deriv.

Derived FX indices are simulated assets with prices derived from the price movements of real major forex pairs. Our algorithms track real-world currency prices and dampen fluctuations caused by news events and market sentiment. Plus, you can choose to trade them at the volatility you prefer.

Tactical indices are simulated instruments designed to capture short-term market trends using signals from popular technical indicators. They provide structured price action that reflects common trading strategies and are unaffected by real-world market events.

With basket indices, you can trade your favourite asset against a basket of five major global currencies, each weighted by 20%.

Due to regulatory requirements, derived indices are unavailable in some countries. Refer to ‘Product offering’ in our [terms of use](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf)for more information.

## What are contracts for difference (CFDs)?

![Image 20](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

CFDs let you predict the price movement of underlying assets without actually owning them. With CFDs, you open a position based on your prediction, and you'll earn a profit if you close your position when the price moves in your favour.

Read [this article](https://blog.deriv.com/blog/posts/what-is-cfd-trading/) to learn more about trading CFDs on Deriv.

## Where can I get more help?

![Image 21](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

If you have specific questions about chart differences or need clarification about how this affects your trading strategy, please [contact our support team](https://deriv.com/help-centre/trading#).

Title: Deposits and Withdrawals | Help Centre

URL Source: https://deriv.com/help-centre/deposits-and-withdrawals/

Published Time: Mon, 27 Apr 2026 10:13:04 GMT

Markdown Content:
## What payment methods can I use for deposits and withdrawals?

![Image 1](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use debit and credit cards, e-wallets, cryptocurrency wallets, Deriv P2P, online banking, and fiat onramp for deposits and withdrawals (see our [Payment methods page](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) for a detailed list).

Once you log in to your Deriv account, you’ll be able to see payment methods available in your country when you [manage your funds](https://deriv.com/cashier/).

## How long does it take for my deposits and withdrawals to be processed?

![Image 2](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We process your deposits and withdrawals internally within 24 hours (depending on your payment method and internal checks). It may take longer for your funds to reach you due to the different processing times by banks and payment service providers. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of the processing times for each payment method.

## What is the minimum deposit or withdrawal amount?

![Image 3](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

The minimum deposit and withdrawal amount varies depending on the payment method. The lowest deposit and withdrawal amount is 5 to 10 USD/EUR/GBP/AUD via e-wallets. See our [Payment methods](https://deriv.com/payment-methods/) page for a complete list of payment methods and their minimum deposit and withdrawal amounts.

## My withdrawal verification link has expired. What should I do?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Be sure to check the spam or junk section of your email if you do not receive the link in your inbox.

To request a new link, go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) and click **Verify my request**. We’ll email you a new link, so please use it within 1 hour.

## How can I remove the withdrawal limit on my account?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We'll remove the 10,000 USD withdrawal limit once your account has been verified.

## Why did my credit card deposit get declined?

![Image 6](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are some reasons why your credit card deposit was declined:

1.   CVV failure. Please contact your bank to check.
2.   Deposit limit, please try again after 1 - 2 hours to make a deposit.
3.   SCA failure. Please contact your bank to check.
4.   RCS reject, allowed number of cards exceeded. Please contact your bank to check.

If you need help, please contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/deposits-and-withdrawals/#).

## Can I withdraw my deposit bonus?

![Image 7](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Yes, but only once your turnover exceeds an amount that's 25 times the deposit bonus value. The bonus is to help you get familiar with our trading platforms, so we'd love for you to use it to trade and earn a potential profit (which you may withdraw at any time).

‍

## What conversion rates do you use for deposits and withdrawals?

![Image 8](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

The currency conversion for your deposits and withdrawals are done by your payment service provider. For example, if you use Skrill, your transaction amount will be converted by Skrill. Please check with your service provider regarding the conversion rates used for your deposits and withdrawals.

## How can I cancel my withdrawal?

![Image 9](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To cancel your withdrawal, follow these steps:

1.   Go to [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal).
2.   We'll send you an email with a verification link. Click that link.
3.   You’ll be brought back to the [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) page. Click **Review pending** and select the transaction that you'd like to cancel.
4.   Click **Yes** to confirm the cancellation. Your funds will be returned to your Deriv account, and your account balance will be updated.

**Note**: You cannot cancel withdrawals if your withdrawal request has already been authorised and processed.

## Can I deposit with my friend's/family member's debit/credit card or e-wallet?

![Image 10](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No. To keep your funds safe, you are strictly prohibited from using payment methods that are not yours. If you do use someone else’s payment method, we’ll suspend your Deriv account for security purposes.

## Why can't I see any payment methods on the Withdrawal page?

![Image 11](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Your payment method will only appear on the Withdrawal page after you've made your first deposit. If you've made a deposit and still don't see your payment method on the Withdrawal screen, it's probably because the payment method you used for the deposit cannot be used for withdrawals. In this case, you may need to use a different payment method that supports withdrawals, too. [Contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/deposits-and-withdrawals/#) if you need help.

‍

## Can I use the same address to make a cryptocurrency deposit?

![Image 12](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Please generate an address on the cryptocurrency deposit page whenever you want to make a deposit. Always use a freshly generated address to ensure accuracy.

‍

## Can I use my Binance wallet to make the cryptocurrency deposit?

![Image 13](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can use any wallet to make the deposit as long as the wallet supports the network we are using.

‍

## What is the minimum deposit and withdrawal for cryptocurrency?

![Image 14](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

There is no minimum deposit for cryptocurrency. The minimum withdrawal is not fixed, so please check for the amount on the [Withdrawal](https://deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) page.

## Can I transfer the funds in my account to another person's account?

![Image 15](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No. Fund transfers can only be made within your own accounts.

‍

# Security

## I lost my phone. How can I disable two-factor authentication (2FA)?

![Image 28](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Please contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/security/#) immediately, and we'll help to disable 2FA on your account. When you have a new phone, please [re-enable 2FA](https://deriv.com/account/two-factor-authentication?_gl=1*ijdki0*_gcl_au*NzU4NzM2NDI2LjE3MDQ3OTEzMTUuMzk3Njg1ODk3LjE3MDkyNjk2MTkuMTcwOTI2OTYxOA..).

## How can I identify Deriv customer support impersonators on Telegram?

![Image 29](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

![Image 30](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/661e6e1e01dd2f56adc6d3ca/661e6e1f01dd2f56adc6dc7e_help-center-telegram-one-7dd660bed6e1c6e3823f18b0db46c34e.png)

Examples of groups impersonating Deriv on Telegram

‍

An impersonator’s main goal is to steal your sensitive information and funds.

Here are some ways to identify impersonators of Deriv customer support:

- Impersonators ask for your login details or other sensitive information via Telegram.

- They provide rewards that sound too good to be true.

- They demand payments via untraceable channels, for example, via cryptocurrency.

- They ask you to download an app that isn’t offered on Google Play Store or Apple App Store.

- They ask you to download software that enables your device to be controlled remotely.

- They ask you to download files containing malware or virus that can infect your device.

‍

Of course, this list isn’t complete. Every day, impersonators come up with new ways to try to steal your information and money.

‍

## How can I stay safe from impersonators on Telegram?

![Image 31](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

*   Do not share your account information and other personal details with anyone via Telegram.
*   If something sounds too good to be true, don’t trust it.
*   Never download apps via Telegram.
*   Run all files through an up-to-date antivirus first before downloading.
*   Please ensure to join the correct [Deriv group](https://t.me/Derivchannelofficial) on Telegram.
*   If you have been contacted by a potential impersonator or if you have any questions, contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/security/#).

‍

**Examples of messages from impersonators:**

![Image 32](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d484/668f61c730ccbe16dcd78003_661e6e1f01dd2f56adc6dc9e_help-center-telegram-two-28b3221a14bfec9560bfef028a746c4b.png)

## How can I identify emails from impersonators of Deriv customer support?

![Image 33](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are some ways to identify emails from impersonators:

*   The email is poorly written, has incorrect grammar, and has many typos.
*   Impersonators ask you to send confidential information over an unsecure platform, for example, via SMS, WhatsApp, email, etc.
*   They ask you to fill out a form on an unsecure website without an HTTPS (secured) connection.
*   They ask you to download unsecure mobile apps in the form of APK files that aren’t offered on Google Play Store or Apple App Store.
*   They ask you to download file attachments or remote access software (such as Teamviewer) to give them remote control of your device. For example, an impersonator may take control and install ransomware on your device and then demand a ransom. If the ransom isn’t paid, you may lose access to your device permanently.
*   Impersonators typically use free email domains such as @yahoo.com, @gmail.com, or @protonmail.com. Always read the sender's full email address to know who sent the email. **Note**: Emails from Deriv will always come from **@deriv.com.**

## How can I change my personal details?

![Image 1](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

## How can I change the currency of my account?

![Image 2](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

While the currencies of your virtual and cryptocurrency accounts are fixed, you can change the currency of your fiat account by following the steps below.

If you haven’t made a deposit or added a real MT5 account, follow these steps:

*   Click on your account balance and click **Add or manage account.**
*   Select **Fiat currencies,** choose the currency you want, and click **Change currency.**‍

If you have made a deposit or have added a real MT5 account, follow these steps:

*   If you have open positions, close them first.
    *   For your Deriv real account, go to **Reports** to close or sell your open positions.
    *   For your Deriv MT5 and Deriv cTrader real accounts, log in to close any open positions.

*   Then, withdraw your funds.
    *   For your Deriv real account, go to [your funds](https://app.deriv.com/cashier/withdrawal) to withdraw your balance.
    *   For your Deriv MT5 and Deriv cTrader real accounts, [transfer your funds](https://deriv.com/cashier/account-transfer?_gl=1*1bvctlk*_gcl_au*NzU4NzM2NDI2LjE3MDQ3OTEzMTUuMzk3Njg1ODk3LjE3MDkyNjk2MTkuMTcwOTI2OTYxOA..) to your Deriv real account first.

*   [Contact us via live chat,](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#) and we’ll help you change the currency of your account.

‍

## Can I change my email address?

![Image 3](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Yes, you can change your email address with us. Also, you can make the changes on your own if you still have access to your current email address.

Kindly follow the steps:

1.   Please log in to your account and go to the “Manage account settings”.
2.   On the left side panel, under the “Security & Safety” category, choose “Email and passwords”, or you may click [here](https://deriv.com/account/passwords?_ga=2.213552532.144519041.1664156028-1088792513.1649824728).
3.   Once you click “Change email”, a verification link is sent to your current email address.
4.   Upon verifying the link in the email, the system will direct you to a pop-up for you to insert the new email address.
5.   Then, you may follow the instructions to change the email address.

Don't worry, if you encounter any issues along the process, please reach out to our support through [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#) for further assistance.

‍

**Note:** If you have lost access to your registered email address, we won’t be able to change it on our end. Contact your email service provider for assistance in regaining access to your email. Once you have regained access to it, follow the steps above to change your email address on Deriv.

## Why can't I create an account?

![Image 4](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are some possible reasons you aren't able to create an account:

*   You’re below 18 years old.
*   You may already have a Deriv account.
*   Our services aren't available in your country of residence.

You may refer to [our terms](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf) for more information. If you need help getting into your account, [contact us via live chat.](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#)

‍

## I forgot my Google/Facebook/Apple account password. How can I log in to my Deriv account?

![Image 5](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

If you created your Deriv account using Apple/Google/Facebook, try resetting your Apple/Google/Facebook password. After that, you should be able to log in to Deriv as usual.

If you'd like to log in using your email address instead, follow these steps:

*   Hit [Forgot password?](https://deriv.com/reset-password) on the [login page.](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929)
*   Enter the email address you use for your Apple/Google/Facebook account.
*   We'll email you a verification link. Click that link and set a new password for your Deriv account.
*   Now, you'll be able to log in to your Deriv account using your email address and password.

## How can I close my account?

![Image 6](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Before closing your account, please ensure to close all your open positions and withdraw all the funds in your account.

Then, [click here to close your account](https://deriv.com/account/deactivate-account).

If you have questions or need help, please contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#).

## How do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?

![Image 7](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can unsubscribe by going to the [Personal details](https://deriv.com/account/personal-details) page. Uncheck the checkbox that says "Get updates about Deriv products, services and events." at the bottom of the page, and click **Submit.**

## What is a dormant fee?

![Image 8](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

It's a fee that we charge for accounts that have been inactive for the last 12 months. Refer to [our terms](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf) for more info.

## Can I open a corporate or business account?

![Image 9](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Yes. [Contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#), and we'll help you through it. We'll need the following information:

*   Name of entity
*   Certificate of incorporation
*   Memorandum and articles of association
*   List of directors
*   List of shareholders
*   Authorisation to manage the account (if your business has more than one director)
*   Passport and utility bill/bank statement of the person managing the account and of each director and shareholder (if your business has more than 1)
*   Utility bill/bank statement containing the address of the business
*   Source of wealth documentation

We may request more information during the signup process.

## Do I need to pay taxes on my trades/profits?

![Image 10](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

It depends on the laws in your country of residence. Please get professional advice on whether you're required to pay taxes on [your profits](https://deriv.com/reports/profit).

## Can I open more than one Deriv account?

![Image 11](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

As per [our terms](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf), we only allow one account per client, which you can open in the currency of your choice (either fiat or crypto). You can add multiple cryptocurrency accounts to your profile if you want to trade with other currencies.

‍

![Image 12](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

![Image 15](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You may reactivate your account by [logging in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) with your email address and password. If you're unable to do so, please [contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/account/#), and we'll help you further.

# Verification

## Do I need to verify my Deriv account?

![Image 30](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No, you do not need to verify your Deriv account unless prompted. If your account requires verification, we will contact you via email to initiate the process and provide you with clear instructions on how to submit your documents.

## When do I need to verify my account?

![Image 31](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We’ll prompt you to verify your account when it’s needed.

‍

## How do I verify my account?

![Image 32](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

When we prompt you to verify your account, follow these steps:

*   [Log in](https://oauth.deriv.com/oauth2/authorize?app_id=16929) to your Deriv account.
*   Go to [Settings](https://deriv.com/account/personal-details)>**Proof of identity** or **Proof of address**.
*   Follow the instructions on the screen to verify your account.

**Note:** The **Proof of identity** and **Proof of address** pages will not be available if your account doesn’t need verification at this time.

## What documents do I need to verify my account?

![Image 33](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You’ll need the following documents to verify your account:

*   **Proof of identity**

You’ll need a valid government-issued identity document such as a national ID card, passport, or driver's licence. Your document must clearly show your name, photo, and date of birth.

‍
*   **Proof of address**Your document must be issued within the last 12 months. Some regions may require more recent documents, such as within 3 or 6 months. It must contain your name, address, the name of the company that issued the document, and the issue date.

Accepted proof of address documents include:
    *   Utility bill
    *   Bank statement
    *   Municipal and property tax bill
    *   Telephone (landline) bill and/or home internet package (landline)
    *   Official residence declaration or Affidavit
    *   Official letters issued by the government, solicitor, or an independent source
    *   Rental or tenancy agreement

## Why do I need to verify my account?

![Image 34](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Our regulators require us to verify your account in accordance with anti-money laundering (AML) and Know Your Customer (KYC) laws. If we have prompted you to upload your documents to verify your account, you'll only be able to continue using our services after your account is verified.

For further information, please check our [Terms and conditions](https://docs.deriv.com/tnc/general-terms.pdf).

‍

## Can I trade without verifying my account?

![Image 35](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

If you have an EU account:

No, you must verify your account before trading.

If you have a non-EU account:

Yes, as long as you haven’t been prompted to verify your account with us.

‍

## How long does verification take?

![Image 36](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We try to review your verification documents within the same day. In some cases, due to high traffic, it may take up to 3 business days. You’ll get a confirmation email from us once the review is complete. You can also check the status of your documents through:

[Settings > Proof of identity](https://deriv.com/account/proof-of-identity)

[Settings > Proof of address](https://deriv.com/account/proof-of-address)

‍

## Why were my documents declined?

![Image 37](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

We may have declined your documents because they were unclear, invalid, expired, had cropped edges, or showed details that did not match your Deriv profile. If you need help, please [contact us via live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/verification/#).

# Trader’s Hub

## What is Trader’s Hub?

![Image 19](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

When you log in to Deriv, you’ll arrive at the Trader’s Hub, a page that houses all the trading accounts and apps available in your region. You can add accounts, check your balance, and launch online trading platforms directly from the Trader’s Hub.

## How do I add a Deriv MT5 trading account on Trader’s Hub?

![Image 20](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Follow these steps to add a Deriv MT5 account and start trading CFDs:

1.   [Log in](https://deriv.com/appstore/traders-hub) to Deriv. 
2.   Under **CFDs**, hit **Get** next to the MT5 account you want.
3.   Create a Deriv MT5 password. **Note:** This password lets you log in to all your Deriv MT5 accounts.
4.   Your new Deriv MT5 trading account is ready. For demo accounts, you can start trading with virtual funds. For real accounts, hit Transfer now to add funds to this account before you start trading.

## How do I add a Deriv X trading account on Trader’s Hub?

![Image 21](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Follow these steps to add a Deriv X account and start trading CFDs:

1.   [Log in](https://deriv.com/appstore/traders-hub) to Deriv.
2.   Under Other CFD Platforms, hit Get next to Deriv X.
3.   Create a Deriv X password.
4.   Your new Deriv X trading account is ready. For demo accounts, you can start trading CFDs with virtual funds. For real accounts, hit Transfer now to transfer funds into this account before you start trading.

## How do I reset my demo trading account balance on Trader’s Hub?

![Image 22](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

1.   [Log in](https://deriv.com/appstore/traders-hub) to Deriv.
2.   Select your demo account.
3.   Hit **Reset balance.**
4.   Your demo account balance will be instantly reset to 10,000 USD.

## Where can I find my account balance on Trader’s Hub?

![Image 23](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Your Options & Multipliers account balance is on the top right, below **Total assets**, while the balances of your CFD accounts are shown next to each account. This applies to demo and real CFDs and options trading accounts.

## Where can I find my account settings on Trader’s Hub?

![Image 24](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Hit the account settings icon on the top-right corner of the screen.

‍

This will bring up the account settings page.

## Where can I find my account ID on Trader’s Hub?

![Image 25](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To get your Options & Multipliers account ID, hit the arrow next to your trading account balance under **Options & Multipliers.**

‍

A pop-up will appear, showing your account ID below the currency.

‍

Your CFD trading account ID is below the account name and balance under CFDs.

## Where can I find my MT5 account credentials on Trader’s Hub?

![Image 26](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Hit **Open** next to your MT5 account.

‍

A pop-up will appear showing your account credentials.

## Where can I find my Deriv X account credentials on Trader’s Hub?

![Image 27](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Hit **Open** next to your Deriv X account.

‍

A pop-up will appear showing your account credentials.

## How do I add a real Options & Multipliers account on Trader’s Hub?

![Image 28](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Follow these steps to add a real Options & Multipliers account:

‍

1.   Select Real from the dropdown menu.
2.   Hit **Get** next to Deriv account.
3.   Follow the instructions to choose your currency, complete your personal details and address, and accept the terms.
4.   Your real Options & Multipliers account is ready. Make a deposit to begin trading.

## Can I remove Trader's Hub and go back to the classic view?

![Image 29](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No, you can’t.

## Can I transfer funds between my EU and non-EU trading accounts?

![Image 30](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No, you can’t transfer funds between EU and non-EU trading accounts.

# Trading tools

## How do I calculate the margin required for a leveraged trade using the trading calculator?

![Image 20](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To calculate the margin required, follow these steps:

1.   ‍**Select the Symbol**: Choose the trading instrument you want to calculate the margin for.
2.   ‍**Enter the Volume in Lots**: Provide the position's size in lots.
3.   ‍**Enter the Asset Price**: Provide the position's entry price of the asset.
4.   ‍**Click Calculate**: The margin required will appear in the Results section on the right, displayed in USD.

## What should I do if my trading calculator results differ from my platform data?

![Image 21](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Ensure the inputs (Symbol, Volume in Lots, Asset Price) entered in the calculator match those on your trading platform. Small variations may occur due to real-time market fluctuations, conversion rate minor variances or rounding differences. These variations are usually minimal and should not significantly differ from the values displayed on your trading platform.

## How can I use the swap calculator to estimate overnight fees?

![Image 22](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To estimate overnight swap charges:

1.   ‍**Select the Symbol**: Choose the trading instrument you want to calculate the swap charges for.
2.   ‍**Enter the Volume in Lots**: Provide the position's size in lots.
3.   ‍**Enter the Asset Price**: Input the asset’s price at the end of the day (UTC server time).
4.   ‍**Click on Calculate**: The estimated overnight swap charges will appear in the Results section on the right.

‍

The Results section will display the following:**Swap Charges**:

:

*   **Swap Charges**: The relevant charges for long (buy) and short (sell) trades converted to USD.
*   ‍**Calculation Type**: The method used to compute the swap charges.
*   ‍**Triple Swap Day**: The specific day where swap charges are tripled.
*   ‍**Weekend Swaps**: Indication of whether swaps are applied over the weekend.

## Where can I find the end-of-day price?

![Image 23](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

You can find the end-of-day price in your trading platform by following these steps:

1.   Open the chart for the trading instrument you're analysing.
2.   Adjust the chart's time interval to "D" (Daily).
3.   Find the end-of-day price at the "C" (Close) value at the bottom of the chart, on the relevant daily candle.

‍

**Example**:

The end-of-day price for EUR/USD on 02/01/2025 is 1.02677.

![Image 24](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d484/67af07ee5cd9ca6c52e00774_image.png)

## How can I estimate the pip value?

![Image 25](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

To estimate the pip value:

1.   ‍**Select the Symbol**: Choose the trading instrument you want to estimate the pip value for.
2.   ‍**Enter the Volume in Lots**: Provide the position size in lots.
3.   ‍**Enter the Asset Price**: Input any price value (this will not impact the pip value calculation).
4.   ‍**Click Calculate**: The estimated pip value will be displayed in the Results section on the right, in USD.

‍

‍**Note**: For every 1 pip movement in the market, your P&L will change based on this pip value.The size for 1 pip will be shown beneath the symbol once you select it.

## How do I reset the trading calculator to input new trade details?

![Image 26](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Click the Reset button at the bottom left of the trading calculator. All fields will be cleared, allowing you to input new trade details.

## Why aren’t trades being copied to my Deriv MT5 account?

![Image 27](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Check that your subscription is active and properly linked to your Deriv MT5 account. Ensure there is sufficient balance in your account, and that your MT5 platform is running. If the issue persists, review your settings or contact us via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre).

## How do I compare multiple signal providers to find the right one?

![Image 28](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Use Deriv MT5’s performance metrics to evaluate providers based on factors such as historical performance, trade frequency, and drawdowns. Compare these to your preferences.

## What should I do if my signal provider stops trading?

![Image 29](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

If your signal provider stops trading, you can check their activity status, decide on how you want to manage any ongoing open trades you copied from them and consider unsubscribing from the inactive provider. You can explore other signal providers that fit your expectations.

## What are the requirements to list my signals on Deriv MT5?

![Image 30](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Requirements include maintaining an active Deriv MT5 account, demonstrating consistent trading activity, and complying with the guidelines for signal providers.

## How can I attract more subscribers to my signals?

![Image 31](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Maintaining consistent trading activity and providing clear descriptions of your trading style can help attract subscribers.

## What happens if I stop providing signals or experience downtime?

![Image 32](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Subscribers will stop receiving trades if signals are paused or discontinued. You may want to inform subscribers if you plan to make changes to your signal availability.

# Fraud prevention

## What is phishing?

![Image 7](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Phishing is a cyberattack where scammers try to trick clients into revealing personal information like their passwords or bank details. Scammers pose as real companies and create fake emails, social media profiles, and numbers to get you to take actions that compromise your data and security. Clicking on malicious links or files in phishing emails may download viruses to your device and expose your data.

## What are some best practices to avoid being phished/scammed?

![Image 8](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Remember the 5 Don'ts:

‍

1. Don’t instantly click on links or download files.

2. Don’t share your personal information.

3. Don’t act immediately if you’re being pressured to.

4. Don’t answer suspicious emails, calls, and messages.

5. Don't be afraid to contact our Customer Support via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/fraud-prevention/#) if you have doubts or concerns.

## What are the main causes that can compromise my account?

![Image 9](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Some causes that can compromise your account are if you:

‍

- Share your personal information.

- Use public wifi.

- Click on unofficial links and files.

- Use a weak password.

- Don’t set up two-factor authentication.

‍

Please contact our Customer Support team via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/fraud-prevention/#) if you have doubts or concerns.

## How can I recognise phishing websites?

![Image 10](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Phishing websites often have URLs that:

- Are misspelled.

- Begin with HTTP, which shows it’s not secure (secure URLs start with HTTPS).

- Use public domains that do not end in .com, .org, or .net.

- Lack security indicators, like the padlock symbol.

![Image 11](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/661e6e1e01dd2f56adc6d3ca/661e6e1f01dd2f56adc6dce0_fake-url-ca24ed9dc0c628e7b9cdbe03cc778691.png)

## How do I identify a phishing email?

![Image 12](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Some red flags of a phishing email:

‍

- The sender’s email address doesn’t end with @deriv.com.

- Spelling and grammatical errors.

- They ask you to click suspicious links and attachments.

- Promises of easy money and huge profits.

- Requests to take immediate action like transferring your money to a bank account.

‍

![Image 13](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/661e6e1e01dd2f56adc6d3ca/661e6e1f01dd2f56adc6dd0b_identify-phishing-email-9c74b8caadbd47974b5170acc3406151.png)

## How do I identify a scam social media account?

![Image 14](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Check the account’s activity: misspelling of the account name, a high following-to-follow ratio, and emoji-loaded offers that sound too good to be true are red flags. We never ask for personal or bank details through social media or do giveaways or promotions. Verify the account with our official social media accounts listed at the bottom of our website.

## What phishing resources does Deriv have?

![Image 15](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Please visit our [blog](https://deriv.com/blog/posts/identify-report-phishing-scams) and [secure and responsible trading page](https://deriv.com/responsible/) for more tips on protecting yourself online.

## Will Deriv compensate for my loss if my account falls under a scamming/phishing trap?

![Image 16](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No, your account safety is your sole responsibility. Please visit our [blog](https://blog.deriv.com/posts/identify-report-phishing-scams/?_gl=1*uwqf8f*_gcl_au*NzU4NzM2NDI2LjE3MDQ3OTEzMTUuMzk3Njg1ODk3LjE3MDkyNjk2MTkuMTcwOTI2OTYxOA..) to learn safety tips on identifying and reporting phishing attempts.

## Do I get rewarded if I report a valid scammer impersonating Deriv?

![Image 17](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

No, Deriv doesn’t offer rewards for reporting scammers.

## How will Deriv contact me if I need to submit my details or documents?

![Image 18](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

For security reasons, all confidential requests and issues are done via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/fraud-prevention/#) with our Customer Support team.

## What should I do if I am phished or my credentials are compromised?

![Image 19](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

If you believe you have been phished or your credentials have been compromised, it's important to take these immediate actions to protect your online accounts and personal data:

- **Change your password:**Change the password for your account immediately. Use a strong, unique password, which can be generated with password management tools.

‍

- **Enable 2FA:**If your account supports two-factor authentication (2FA), enable it. This provides an extra layer of security by requiring a second verification method (e.g., a code sent to your phone) to access your account.

‍

- **Check your accounts:** Review all your other online accounts (email, social media, banking, etc.) to ensure they haven't been compromised as well. If you use the same password for multiple accounts, change those passwords too.

‍

- **Scan for viruses:** Run a full system scan on your computer and any devices you used to access your account. Make sure your antivirus and anti-malware software is up to date.

‍

- **Monitor accounts:**Keep a close eye on your accounts for any suspicious activity. This includes checking for unauthorised transactions, changes to account settings, or new login attempts.

‍

- **Notify Deriv:** Contact our Customer Support team via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/fraud-prevention/#). Please have the scammer account’s information and evidence/screenshots ready so we can take appropriate action as soon as possible.

## What can I do when I find any unrecognised transactions on my Deriv account?

![Image 20](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d440/66585fe0e1dc7e70cc75d591_arrow-down.svg)

Here are a few steps you can take immediately when you discover unrecognised transactions:

:

*   **Notify Deriv:**Contact our Customer Support team via [live chat](https://deriv.com/help-centre/fraud-prevention/#). Please have the scammer account’s information and evidence/screenshots ready so we can take appropriate action as soon as possible. Depending on the severity of the situation, we may temporarily freeze or close your account to prevent further unauthorised transactions.
*   **Change your Deriv password:** Change the password for your account immediately. Use a strong, unique password, which can be generated with password management tools. If you use this same password for other accounts, make sure you change those, too.**‍**
*   **Monitor your accounts:**Keep a close eye on your accounts for any suspicious activity. This includes checking for unauthorised transactions, changes to account settings, or new login attempts.
